decisions.decision: Use plain render() from @testing-library/react without any providers (no MemoryRouter, no QueryClientProvider)
alternatives_rejected: renderWithProviders helper — unnecessary since component is pure presentational with no hooks or context

decisions.decision: Use real formatCurrency/formatSignedCurrency utilities without mocking, assert exact formatted output strings
alternatives_rejected: vi.mock() the formatters — adds complexity, couples to mock setup, diverges from AnalyticsSummaryCards.test.tsx pattern

decisions.decision: Include test case for selectedMarketId not matching any position, asserting the fallback 'No recorded exposure in the selected market yet.' text renders
alternatives_rejected: Skip this case — it's a real user-visible state that deserves coverage

decisions.decision: Test toneForValue color logic via toHaveStyle() assertions on rendered elements, checking CSS variable strings (e.g. 'var(--color-success)')
alternatives_rejected: Only test text content — misses key UX feature of color-coded P&L values

decisions.decision: Place test file at frontend/src/__tests__/AccountPnlSection.test.tsx following existing convention
alternatives_rejected: Co-located __tests__ directory next to component — not the pattern used in this project

steps.task: Create test file frontend/src/__tests__/AccountPnlSection.test.tsx with imports (vitest, testing-library, component, format utilities, types) and a factory function makeAccountPnlData() that produces valid AccountPnlResponse test data with 2-3 positions including positive, negative, and zero P&L values
Write test: 'shows empty state when no accountId is set' — render with accountId='' and assert 'Set your Account ID in the header' text is visible
Write test: 'shows loading state when isLoading is true' — render with accountId set and isLoading=true, assert LoadingPage spinner renders (query for role or known spinner element)
Write test: 'shows error message when error is truthy' — render with error=new Error('fail') and isLoading=false, assert 'Unable to load account P&L right now' text is visible

Write test: 'renders all PnL metric cards with correct formatted values' — render with full data, assert labels (Cost Basis, Marked Value, Realized P&L, Unrealized P&L, Net P&L) and their formatted values appear

Write test: 'applies correct color tones for positive/negative/zero P&L values' — render with data containing positive realizedPnl, negative unrealizedPnl, zero netPnl; use toHaveStyle to check color properties on metric value elements

Write test: 'renders selected market detail card when selectedMarketId matches a position' — render with selectedMarketId matching one position, assert the market title, status badge, and formatted metric values appear in the detail card

Write test: 'shows fallback message when selectedMarketId does not match any position' — render with selectedMarketId='nonexistent', assert 'No recorded exposure in the selected market yet.' is visible
Write test: 'renders positions table with all positions' — render with data containing multiple positions, assert each position's marketTitle and formatted values appear in the table
Write test: 'highlights the selected market row in the positions table' — render with selectedMarketId matching a position, assert the matching row has the highlight background style
Write test: 'shows empty positions message when positions array is empty' — render with data that has empty positions array, assert 'No marked positions yet.' text is visible
Run vitest on the new test file to verify all tests pass, fix any issues
